====Pokémon Black 2 and White 2 Animated Trailer====
Rosa appeared in the [[Pokémon Black Version 2 and Pokémon White Version 2 Animated Trailer]], where she was seen battling [[Cheren]] at the [[Aspertia Gym]].

|desc={{p|Serperior}} is Rosa's only known Pokémon. She used it during her Gym battle against Cheren's {{p|Stoutland}}.

Serperior's known moves are {{m|Hyper Beam}}, {{m|Slam}}, {{m|Frenzy Plant}}, and {{m|Protect}}.}}
